title: Uruguayan Chicken Wrap
description: A flavorful and fresh wrap filled with Uruguayan-inspired chicken and crunchy vegetables.
instructions: 2. Season chicken breast with salt, pepper, and your favorite spices.
3. Grill chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
4. Let chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
5. Warm tortilla wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
6. Assemble wraps by spreading salsa on the bottom half, then adding sliced chicken, lettuce, bell peppers, and cheese.
7. Fold wraps in half and serve immediately.
8. Optional: add any additional toppings, such as sliced avocado or sour cream.
